# RRT*

Sampling-based planner that rewires the tree to improve path cost and achieve asymptotic optimality.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Planning</span>
  <span>robotics, motion planning, optimal planning</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Initialize tree at start state] --> B[Sample random state]
    B --> C[Find nearest node]
    C --> D[Steer toward sample]
    D --> E{Collision free?}
    E -- No --> B
    E -- Yes --> F[Find nearby nodes]
    F --> G[Choose lowest-cost parent]
    G --> H[Add new node]
    H --> I[Rewire cheaper neighbors]
    I --> J{Goal reached?}
    J -- No --> B
    J -- Yes --> K[Return best path found]
```


## Notes

- RRT* extends RRT with near-neighbor parent selection and rewiring.
- Solution quality improves as the number of samples increases.
